projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage H1 2025 - H2 2025 for upcoming detailed design and procurement packages for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Major new HV transmission lines and substations to connect the Hunter-Central Coast Renewable Energy Zone. Multiple stages of procurement for significant HV components are anticipated over the next few years, including HV transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.

projects.projectName: New England Transmission Project (New England REZ)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage H1 2025 - H2 2025 for upcoming detailed design and procurement packages for HV equipment.
projects.summary: Development of new HV transmission infrastructure for the New England Renewable Energy Zone, involving new substations, HV transmission lines, transformers, and switchgear in various voltage levels.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H2 2025 - H1 2026 as FEED studies conclude and major procurement for HVDC converter stations and transmission components begin.
projects.summary: A major new HV interconnector between Victoria and NSW, involving significant lengths of new HV transmission lines and converter stations. This project will require extensive HV equipment including transformers, circuit breakers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and final FAT for grid connection components, including new 330kV substation infrastructure, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: Large-scale 850MW / 1680MWh Battery Energy Storage System connected to the 500kV network. While overall construction is underway, specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT, QAQC surveillance during installation, and commissioning inspection for the substation and grid connection are imminent or ongoing.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 for procurement of renewable energy components and associated grid connection HV equipment, following FEED studies.
projects.summary: Large-scale green hydrogen production facility, integrating significant renewable energy (solar and wind) which will require new or upgraded HV grid connection infrastructure, including substations, transformers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 - H2 2025 for procurement of grid connection and substation HV equipment following FID.
projects.summary: Proposed 700MW / 2800MWh battery at the Eraring power station site. Will require significant grid connection infrastructure, including new substation and HV equipment like transformers and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 - H2 2025 for procurement of grid connection and substation HV equipment following FID.
projects.summary: Proposed 500MW / 2000MWh Battery Energy Storage System at the Loy Yang A power station. The project will require new grid connection infrastructure, including substation works, HV transformers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage now - early works and first stage projects for new HV transmission lines and substations are progressing to procurement for various HV components.
projects.summary: An ambitious plan to build extensive new HV transmission lines and substations across Queensland to connect renewable energy sources. This is a multi-year program with ongoing and upcoming procurement for HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 as revised domestic development plans solidify and initial procurement for large-scale solar, BESS, and associated HV transmission in NT begins.
projects.summary: Gigawatt-scale solar PV and BESS project. The revised project focuses initially on domestic power supply, requiring significant HV transmission infrastructure within the Northern Territory, including substations, transformers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage H2 2024 - H1 2025 for procurement of main EPC and specialist HV grid connection equipment for Stage 2.
projects.summary: The second stage of a large wind farm, adding 400MW. This will require new or upgraded grid connection infrastructure, including substation equipment, HV transformers, and switchgear, with procurement expected to open late 2024/early 2025.

projects.projectName: Star of the South Offshore Wind Farm
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H2 2025 - H1 2026 for FEED studies and initial procurement packages for onshore and offshore HV transmission and substation components.
projects.summary: Australia's first offshore wind project, up to 2.2GW. Requires significant onshore and offshore HV transmission infrastructure, including export cables, new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear. Early procurement for specialist packages expected from 2026.

projects.projectName: AirTrunk SYD2 Hyperscale Data Centre Expansion
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target electrical infrastructure FAT and QAQC for new HV switchgear, transformers, and feeder connections required for ongoing expansion phases.
projects.summary: Ongoing expansion of a hyperscale data centre facility. These expansions continuously demand new HV grid connections, substations, HV switchgear, and transformers to meet increasing power requirements. Specialist sub-packages for HV equipment are ongoing.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target electrical infrastructure FAT and QAQC for new HV switchgear, transformers, and substation upgrades for ongoing expansion.
projects.summary: Microsoft is continuously expanding its data centre footprint in major Australian cities. These expansions require new or augmented substations, HV feeders, transformers, and switchgear. Procurement for these power infrastructure components is ongoing.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H2 2024 - H1 2025 for commissioning QAQC and potential future expansions of substation equipment, including HV transformers and switchgear.
projects.summary: A significant HV transmission line project in Western Australia. While largely under construction, specialist packages for specific substations or commissioning QAQC for HV components such as transformers and switchgear could still be relevant and imminent.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 for procurement of main EPC and associated HV grid connection equipment, including new substations and HV components.
projects.summary: A proposed 1.4GW wind farm in NSW. Expected to require a new major grid connection, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear. FID targeted for H2 2024, leading to procurement in 2025.

projects.projectName: Western Downs Green Power Hub Expansion
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target BESS grid connection QAQC and FAT for current expansion phases, involving new substation infrastructure, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: Large-scale integrated solar and BESS project. While the solar component is largely built, the BESS expansion phases are under construction, requiring ongoing specialist procurement for grid connection, including new substation bays, HV transformers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for remaining grid connection components, including substation equipment, HV transformers, and switchgear, as the project nears completion.
projects.summary: One of Australia's largest onshore wind farms (1GW+), currently under construction. While main EPC is awarded, specialist sub-packages for final grid connection components or commissioning QAQC for the substation, HV transformers, and switchgear would be relevant.

projects.projectName: New South Wales Renewable Energy Zone (REZ) Infrastructure Program
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Ongoing - engage with EnergyCo NSW and Transgrid for multiple upcoming and active packages across all REZs (Central-West Orana, New England, Hunter-Central Coast, South West, Illawarra) covering extensive HV infrastructure.
projects.summary: A strategic program encompassing extensive new HV transmission and substation infrastructure across multiple Renewable Energy Zones in NSW. This program generates continuous opportunities for FAT and inspection of HV transformers, circuit breakers, switchgear, and GIS for various upcoming and active projects within the REZs.

projects.projectName: Victoria Renewable Energy Zones (VREZ) Transmission Development
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage H1 2025 - H2 2025 for upcoming regional network augmentation packages, including new HV lines and substations, within the various VREZs.
projects.summary: Development of transmission infrastructure for Victoria's Renewable Energy Zones (Western, Central North, Murray River, Gippsland), which will require substantial new and upgraded HV transmission lines, substations, transformers, and switchgear.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for remaining HV substation equipment and connections, including transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS, as the interconnector nears completion.
projects.summary: Major 330kV interconnector between NSW and South Australia. While the project is under construction, commissioning inspection and specialist QAQC for specific substation equipment, including HV transformers, switchgear, and GIS, could still be imminent or ongoing.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for grid connection and substation components (transformers, switchgear) as the pumped hydro project nears completion.
projects.summary: The 250MW Kidston Pumped Hydro project is under construction. While major civil works are progressing, commissioning QAQC for grid connection and substation components (HV transformers, switchgear) is imminent and requires specialist inspection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 for procurement of initial BESS and Solar grid integration components, including new HV transformers and switchgear, as specific projects within the hub advance.
projects.summary: AGL's plan to transform former coal power station sites into a renewable energy hub, including BESS, solar, and potentially hydrogen. This will involve new grid connection points and upgrades to existing HV infrastructure, requiring new transformers and switchgear.

projects.projectName: Fortescue Future Industries (FFI) Gladstone Green Hydrogen Project
projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 for procurement of renewable energy supply connection infrastructure, including substations and HV equipment, as FID approaches.
projects.summary: Large-scale green hydrogen production and export facility, requiring significant renewable energy input and associated HV transmission/substation infrastructure for power offtake and connection. FEED studies are underway, with procurement for HV components expected to follow FID.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate for Stage 1 commissioning; engage Q4 2024 - H1 2025 for procurement packages for Stages 2 & 3, including significant grid connection and substation HV equipment.
projects.summary: Multi-stage renewable energy project (wind, solar, BESS). While Stage 1 is nearing completion (with ongoing commissioning needs), Stages 2 and 3 are under development and entering procurement phases, requiring new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear for grid connection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: Medium priority. Engage H1 2025 for procurement of main EPC and associated HV grid connection equipment, including new substation and HV components, following FID.
projects.summary: Proposed 400MW / 1600MWh battery at the Kogan Creek power station. This project will connect to the existing 275kV network and require new substation infrastructure, including HV transformers and switchgear. FID is expected late 2024/early 2025.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - developers are actively procuring EPC and long-lead HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, switchgear) for these awarded transmission lots.
projects.summary: Concession awarded for 309 km of new 500kV HV transmission lines and associated substations in Ceará and Rio Grande do Norte. Entering detailed design and procurement for HV equipment.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - developers are actively procuring EPC and long-lead HV equipment (transformers, circuit breakers, GIS, switchgear) for these awarded transmission lots.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for grid connection components (new substation, HV transformers, switchgear) as the project nears operational status.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for grid connection components (new substation, HV transformers, switchgear) as the project nears operational status.
projects.summary: Large wind farm complex. While main construction is underway, specialist HV equipment for grid connection, including new substation, HV transformers, and switchgear, and associated QAQC and commissioning are ongoing or imminent for MadePartners' scope.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for grid connection components for ongoing phases, including new substation, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: One of Latin America's largest solar PV projects, with phases continuously under construction. Specialist HV equipment for grid connection or commissioning QAQC for new substation, HV transformers, and switchgear for ongoing phases are highly relevant and imminent.

projects.projectName: Leilão de Transmissão ANEEL nº 01/2024 (Upcoming Auctions)
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Engage now with potential bidders/winners - pre-tender for developers, future procurement for winners. Major opportunities for HV equipment FAT and inspection.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target electrical infrastructure FAT and QAQC for new HV switchgear, transformers, and feeder connections for ongoing expansion phases.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target electrical infrastructure FAT and QAQC for new HV switchgear, transformers, and substation upgrades for ongoing expansion phases.
projects.summary: AWS is continuously expanding its data centre capacity in Brazil. These projects necessitate new or augmented substations, HV feeders, transformers, and switchgear. Procurement for these power infrastructure components is ongoing.

projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - target commissioning inspection and FAT for grid connection components for ongoing and new phases, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear.
projects.summary: A large multi-phase wind farm complex with phases continuously under construction or recently awarded. Specialist sub-packages for HV equipment FAT or commissioning QAQC for grid connection (new substations, HV transformers, switchgear) are imminent or ongoing.

projects.projectName: AES Brasil Wind & Solar Portfolio Expansion
projects.mpEngagementWindow: High priority. Immediate - engage for ongoing wind and solar projects' grid connection components, including new substations, HV transformers, and switchgear procurement and commissioning QAQC.

These projects are continuously tendered by ANEEL, representing a steady pipeline of opportunities for new HV transmission lines, substations, transformers, circuit breakers, and GIS over the next few years.
